message:
fix(pages): harden export, deploy isolation, TOFU scoping, and lock propagation

Export engine (export.rs, lib.rs, config_input.rs):
- Schema-introspect source DB at export time so the query adapts to
  optional columns (updated_at, model, attachment_refs, extra_json)
  instead of failing on older databases that lack them
- Preserve source message primary keys across export so FTS rowid
  references stay stable; remove content= / content_rowid= from FTS5
  table definitions (standalone FTS, populated explicitly)
- Derive model and attachment_refs from extra_json when the dedicated
  columns are absent, probing several known JSON pointer paths
- Reject --include-attachments for pages exports with a clear error;
  demote include_attachments config option from warning to hard error
  in validation

Deploy isolation (deploy_cloudflare.rs, deploy_github.rs):
- Add resolve_deploy_site_dir() to both deployers: accepts either a
  bundle root (containing site/) or a direct site/ path, and always
  resolves to the public site/ subtree before staging/copying.
  Prevents accidental upload of private/ artifacts (e.g. master-key.json)
- Size check in GitHubDeployer now operates on site/ only, not the
  full bundle root

Profiles atomic write (profiles.rs):
- Replace path.with_extension("tmp") with unique_atomic_temp_path()
  so concurrent writers don't collide on the same temp file name
- Add replace_file_from_temp() with a Windows-aware fallback that
  back-and-restores the existing file when rename-over fails

Auth / viewer / search JS (auth.js, viewer.js, search.js, conversation.js):
- Fix TOFU key to scope on archive URL (not self-declared export_id)
  so a full archive swap at the same URL correctly triggers a warning
- Restore clearStoredSession() before restoring a saved session when
  TOFU reports invalid fingerprint
- Split lockArchive() into handleLockButtonClick / handleExternalLockEvent
  to avoid recursive lock dispatch; broadcast a cass:lock event from auth
  so viewer and conversation modules can react
- viewer.js handleGlobalLock() clears state without re-triggering lock;
  conversation.js resets attachment state on lock; clearSearch() gains a
  reloadRecent option to avoid an unnecessary recent-list fetch during lock
- Wire attachment rendering in conversation view: initAttachments on load,
  hydrateDirectMessageAttachments after DOM render, appendAttachmentsToMessage
  for virtual-list items; gracefully skips when manifest unavailable

Tests: add/update coverage for all the above behaviours including
private-artifact isolation, TOFU key uniqueness, atomic temp-path
collision safety, schema-adaptive export query, and FTS existence checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,8 +123,8 @@ export async function render() {

Database Caching (OPFS)

${opfsAvailable ? `

- Cache the decrypted database locally for faster loading. - The cache is encrypted at rest and tied to this browser. + Cache the decrypted database locally for faster browsing after unlock. + This cache stays in this browser profile until you clear it.
